scene.setting: a close-up view of a computer monitor displaying a technical interface with text and a map.

objects: a computer monitor displaying a blue and white interface with text, a map, and a list of numbers.
key_actions: the text on the monitor changes from '有内鬼,終止交易' to 'DETECT GSM900 52 SELECT CELL'.
visual_objective.visibility_notes: The monitor is the central focus of the shot.

audio_description: Electronic beeps and a low-frequency hum are heard, creating a tense and technological atmosphere.
emotion_description: The audio creates a tense and suspenseful mood.
